title: Stream Server-Sent Events with Go
summary: Stream text/event-stream responses from Go with one message channel and per-message flushes.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers SSE headers and message formatting, safe multi-line event formatting, per-message flushes, stopping on client disconnect, stopping on channel close, rejecting writers without streaming support, propagating write errors, and nil input validation.
